group.label: General
group.comment: Master settings for the Admin Passkey security suite.

field.label: Enable Admin Passkey
field.comment: Master switch for the Admin Passkey suite. When disabled, no passkey behaviour is active.

group.label: Authentication Policy
group.comment: Control how passkeys, passwords, and Magento 2FA interact on the Admin login.

field.label: Passkey-First Login
field.comment: Show the passkey prompt first on the Admin login page when a passkey is available.

field.label: Enable Password Fallback
field.comment: Allow username and password login as a fallback. Disabling this can lock admins out; keep a recovery path.

field.label: Enable Magento 2FA for Password Login
field.comment: Require Magento Two-Factor Authentication after username/password login. Passkey login always replaces 2FA and skips this step.

group.label: Login Page Design
group.comment: Choose the Admin login page layout. Copy fields for the selected layout appear in the subsections below.

field.label: Layout
field.comment: Spotlight is the default passkey-first card. Split Console and Command Deck show a branded side panel.

group.label: Spotlight Layout Content
group.comment: Text and trust badges for the centered Spotlight login card.

field.label: Password 2FA Notice
field.comment: Shown on the password tab only.

group.label: Split Console Layout Content
group.comment: Brand rail and sign-in copy for the Split Console layout.

field.label: Password 2FA Notice
field.comment: Shown below the password field when using credentials.

group.label: Command Deck Layout Content
group.comment: Stage panel and authentication module copy for the Command Deck layout.

field.label: Password 2FA Notice
field.comment: Shown below the password field when using credentials.

group.label: WebAuthn
group.comment: Relying party and ceremony settings for passkey registration and login. Leave RP ID and origin empty to derive them from the store base URL.

field.label: Relying Party Name
field.comment: Human-readable name shown by the authenticator during registration. Falls back to the branding company name when empty.

field.label: Relying Party ID (rpId)
field.comment: Registrable domain used as the WebAuthn rpId (e.g. example.com). Leave empty to derive it from the store base URL host.

field.label: Expected Origin
field.comment: Origin expected in WebAuthn responses (e.g. https://example.com). Leave empty to derive it from the store base URL.

field.label: User Verification
field.comment: WebAuthn userVerification requirement for registration and assertion ceremonies.

field.label: Resident Key
field.comment: WebAuthn residentKey requirement. Preferred or Required enables discoverable (usernameless) passkeys.

field.label: Ceremony Timeout (milliseconds)
field.comment: Timeout hint passed to the browser WebAuthn ceremony.

field.label: Challenge Lifetime (seconds)
field.comment: How long a generated challenge remains valid before it expires and must be reissued.

group.label: Onboarding
group.comment: Guide administrators through passkey enrollment.

field.label: Require Passkey Onboarding
field.comment: Redirect admins without a passkey to the setup wizard after login, respecting recovery exceptions.

field.label: Recommend a Second Passkey
field.comment: Recommend registering a backup passkey at the end of the setup wizard.

group.label: Trusted Devices
group.comment: Remember trusted browsers to reduce repeated verification.

field.label: Trusted Device Lifetime (days)
field.comment: Number of days a trusted device remains valid before re-verification is required.

field.label: Successful Logins Before Trust
field.comment: Number of successful logins from a browser before it is remembered as a trusted device.

group.label: Lockout
group.comment: Throttle and lock accounts after repeated failed login attempts.

field.label: Maximum Failed Attempts
field.comment: Number of failed login attempts before the account is locked.

field.label: Lockout Duration (minutes)
field.comment: How long an account stays locked after exceeding the failed-attempt threshold.

field.label: Failed Attempt Window (minutes)
field.comment: Rolling time window in which failed attempts are counted toward the lockout threshold.

group.label: Recovery
group.comment: Emergency fallback when passkey authentication blocks Admin access.

field.label: Recovery Warning Text
field.comment: Warning message displayed before an administrator enables emergency recovery.

field.label: Recovery Auto-Expiry (minutes)
field.comment: Emergency recovery mode disables itself automatically after this many minutes so it can never stay on indefinitely.

group.label: Migration Dashboard
group.comment: Track passkey adoption progress across administrators.

field.label: Enable Reminder Emails
field.comment: Allow sending reminder emails to administrators who have not registered a passkey.

group.label: Security Dashboard Widget
group.comment: Configurable security-status widget on the Magento Admin dashboard.

field.label: Enable Dashboard Widget
field.comment: Enabled by default after installation. Individual cards can be toggled below.

field.label: Refresh Interval (seconds)
field.comment: How often the dashboard widget refreshes its data.

field.label: Card: Passkey vs Password Login Ratio

group.label: Security Score
group.comment: Weighting for the 0-100 security score engine. Weights should sum to 100.

field.label: Weight: Authentication
field.comment: Relative weight of authentication controls in the total score.

field.label: Weight: Security
field.comment: Relative weight of platform security controls in the total score.

field.label: Weight: Operational
field.comment: Relative weight of operational controls in the total score.

field.label: Weight: Threats
field.comment: Relative weight of active threat indicators in the total score.

group.label: Health Check
group.comment: Environment and configuration sanity checks for the module.

group.label: Diagnostics
group.comment: Support diagnostics report generation and delivery.

field.label: Support Email Recipient
field.comment: Destination address used when sending diagnostics reports to the developer.

field.label: Support Reference Prefix
field.comment: Prefix used for the Support Reference ID in ZIP filenames, manifests, and emails.

group.label: Cleanup
group.comment: Data retention and scheduled cleanup policies.

field.label: Challenge Retention (days)
field.comment: How long expired WebAuthn challenges are retained before cleanup.

field.label: Diagnostics Retention (days)
field.comment: How long generated diagnostics reports are retained before cleanup.

field.label: Audit Log Retention (days)
field.comment: How long audit events are retained before cleanup.

field.label: Security Score Snapshot Retention (days)
field.comment: How long historical security score snapshots are retained before cleanup.

field.label: Reminder History Retention (days)
field.comment: How long migration reminder history rows are retained before cleanup.

field.label: Cleanup Cron Schedule
field.comment: Cron expression for the scheduled cleanup job (e.g. 0 3 * * *).

group.label: Fail2Ban
group.comment: Write parseable log lines for Fail2Ban to consume.

field.label: Fail2Ban Log Path
field.comment: Filesystem path (relative to the Magento root) for Fail2Ban-compatible log lines.

group.label: White Label & Branding
group.comment: Optional white-label branding. Enabled by default with FalconMedia defaults.

field.label: Enable Branding
field.comment: When enabled, the configured branding replaces the default FalconMedia branding.

field.label: Primary Accent Color
field.comment: Hex color used as the primary accent in branded surfaces (e.g. #f26322).

field.label: Secondary Accent Color
field.comment: Hex color used as the secondary accent in branded surfaces (e.g. #2563eb).

field.label: Logo
field.comment: Accepted: SVG, PNG, JPG, WebP. SVG files are sanitised before storage.

field.label: Icon
field.comment: Accepted: SVG, PNG, JPG, WebP. SVG files are sanitised before storage.

field.label: Background Image (optional)
field.comment: Optional login background. Accepted: SVG, PNG, JPG, WebP.

field.label: Wizard Illustration
field.comment: Illustration shown in the passkey setup wizard. Accepted: SVG, PNG, JPG, WebP.

field.label: Dashboard Icon
field.comment: Icon shown on the Admin dashboard widget. Accepted: SVG, PNG, JPG, WebP.

field.label: Login Intro Copy
field.comment: Text shown above the passkey button on the Admin login. Leave empty for the default.

field.label: Wizard Intro Copy
field.comment: Text shown at the start of the passkey setup wizard. Leave empty for the default.

field.label: Diagnostics Intro Copy
field.comment: Text shown on the diagnostics screen. Leave empty for the default.

group.label: Email Templates
group.comment: Transactional email templates used by the module.

field.label: Passkey Reminder Template
field.comment: Email sent to administrators who have not registered a passkey.

field.label: Lockout Notification Template
field.comment: Email sent when an administrator account is locked out.

field.label: Recovery Notification Template
field.comment: Email sent when emergency recovery mode is enabled or disabled.

field.label: Diagnostics Report Template
field.comment: Email used when sending a diagnostics report to the developer.

field.label: Support Confirmation Template
field.comment: Confirmation email sent to an administrator after a support request.

field.label: Security Alert Template
field.comment: Email sent when a critical security event is detected.

group.label: Developer Options
group.comment: Diagnostics-only options. Do not enable on production unless instructed.

field.label: Enable Debug Logging
field.comment: Write verbose module diagnostics to the Magento log. Keep disabled on production.
